nodes.name: Review reorder worklist (prioritized by urgency)
nodes.documentation: Inventory Manager opens the worklist, sorted by urgency: available < minStock first, then <= safetyStock, then other at-or-below-reorderPoint items. Reviews the context panel per item. [SCOR P3 | OE5 | build-new; axiom A21 human-in-the-loop]

nodes.name: Defer (snooze with reason and reminder date)
nodes.documentation: The Manager snoozes the item with a mandatory reason and a reminder date; the item stays on the list in a deferred section. [SCOR P3 | OE5 | build-new]

nodes.name: Flag for investigation (suppress trigger)
nodes.documentation: The Manager flags a suspected data error (e.g. an allocation or count problem); the trigger is suppressed temporarily pending review. [SCOR P3 | OE5 | build-new]

nodes.name: Raise replenishment requisition (one-click)
nodes.documentation: The Manager clicks Raise Requisition on a worklist item, creating the pre-filled draft. [SCOR P3 -> O2 | S1.1 | ISO 8.4 | build-new; axiom A21]

nodes.name: Review and adjust the draft requisition
nodes.documentation: The Manager reviews the pre-filled draft, adjusts quantity if the suggested amount is wrong (e.g. in-transit stock), sets the need date, adds a line note, confirms the cost center. Identifier auto-assigned and immutable from first save. [SCOR S1.1 | O2 | ISO 7.5 | build-new]

nodes.name: Submit requisition (joins standard flow)
nodes.documentation: The Manager submits; the INITIATION mandatory-field gate and soft budget check run; the requisition enters the standard approval chain (Diagram 03). The worklist entry is marked requisition-raised and the de-duplicate guard activates. [SCOR O2 | S1.1 | OE2 | ISO 8.4 | build-new]

nodes.name: Raise GRN on physical receipt (Diagram 08)
nodes.documentation: After the standard approval/sourcing/PO flow (Diagrams 02-05) and delivery, Receiving raises the GRN. GRN finalization triggers the RECEIPT movement automatically. [SCOR S2.4/S2.6 | ISO 8.6 | build-new; axiom A21]

nodes.name: Post ADJUSTMENT movement (note required)
nodes.documentation: Sub-flow: on a physical-count variance, damage write-off, or correction, the Manager posts an ADJUSTMENT (type, quantity, direction add/subtract, itemId, warehouseCode, mandatory note, reference). The platform updates stockOnHand, recomputes available, and re-evaluates the reorder trigger. [SCOR P3 | OE4 | ISO 7.5 | build-new]

nodes.name: Post inter-warehouse TRANSFER (debit + credit)
nodes.documentation: Sub-flow: to move stock between warehouses, the Manager creates a TRANSFER (source, destination, itemId, quantity). The platform posts a TRANSFER debit on the source and a credit on the destination sharing a movementOrderId; source available reduces on debit. [SCOR S2.6 | P3 | OE4 | build-new]

nodes.name: Recompute available = stockOnHand - allocated
nodes.documentation: The platform recomputes available for the affected item-warehouse pair and updates lastMovementAt. [SCOR S2.6 | OE4 | build-new]

nodes.name: No action (above reorder point or open req exists)
nodes.documentation: available > reorderPoint OR an open requisition exists for the item; the platform takes no action and the item does not surface. [SCOR P3 | build-new]

nodes.name: Surface item on reorder worklist (with suggestedQty)
nodes.documentation: The worklist entry (system-computed, not stored) carries: item code/description, warehouseCode, stockOnHand, allocated, available, reorderPoint, safetyStock, minStock, maxStock, suggestedQty (= maxStock - available, floored at 0), primary supplier (Item.standardSupplierId), lead time, last purchase price. [SCOR P3 | OE4 | build-new]

nodes.name: Pre-fill draft replenishment requisition
nodes.documentation: System creates a draft requisition: requester = Inventory Manager, department = warehouse owning department, category = Items, purchaseType derived from the item's standard supplier (Import if foreign, Local if domestic), priority = Within2Days, currency = base, one line (itemId, quantity = suggestedQty editable, unitOfMeasure = Item.purchaseUom, needDate = today + lead time). reorderOrigin = true. [SCOR P3 -> O2 | S1.1 | ISO 8.4 | build-new; axiom A21]

nodes.name: Post RECEIPT movement on GRN finalization
nodes.documentation: On GRN finalization the platform posts a RECEIPT StockMovement (type RECEIPT, itemId, warehouseCode, quantity = GRN quantity, reference = grnId). Posted by the platform, not a manual Inventory Manager action. [SCOR S2.4/S2.6 | ISO 8.6 | build-new; axiom A21]

nodes.name: Increment stockOnHand; recompute available
nodes.documentation: stockOnHand += RECEIPT.quantity; recompute available; set lastMovementAt. [SCOR S2.6 | P3 | OE4 | build-new; axiom A21]

nodes.name: available <= reorderPoint AND no open requisition?
nodes.documentation: Expression: Inventory.available <= Item.reorderPoint AND NOT EXISTS (open requisition for this itemId, status NOT IN {COMPLETED, CANCELLED}). True -> surface on the reorder worklist. False -> no action (above reorder point, or an open requisition already covers it). [SCOR P3 Plan Source | ISO 8.4 | build-new; axiom A21]

nodes.name: Manager decision on worklist item
nodes.documentation: action = RAISE_REQUISITION -> pre-fill and open a draft requisition; action = DEFER -> snooze with mandatory reason and reminder date (stays on list, deferred section); action = INVESTIGATE -> flag the balance for review, suppress the trigger temporarily. [SCOR P3 | OE5 | build-new]

nodes.name: available > reorderPoint now?
nodes.documentation: If available now exceeds reorderPoint, clear the worklist entry; the replenishment cycle is complete. Otherwise the item remains on the worklist. [SCOR S2.6 | P3 | OE4 | build-new; axiom A21]

nodes.name: Stock movement posts
nodes.documentation: Trigger: every RECEIPT, ISSUE, ADJUSTMENT, or TRANSFER StockMovement that changes stockOnHand for an item-warehouse pair. [SCOR P3 | S2.6 | OE4 | build-new; axiom A21]

nodes.name: Replenishment cycle complete / no action
nodes.documentation: The worklist entry clears (available > reorderPoint) and the StockMovement ledger provides a full audit trail from demand trigger through receipt; or the trigger took no action. [SCOR S2.6 | P3 | OE4 | build-new]

flows.guard: available <= reorderPoint AND no open requisition
available > reorderPoint OR open requisition exists
